comment: Behaviour lives here in Git (single source of truth). The Mend app is only the runner — nothing app-specific lives at Mend (all images/charts/k0s are public, no registry creds).

kubernetes.description: Renovate's kubernetes manager has no default file scope — point it at our manifests so image tags (e.g. viren070/aiostreams) get bump PRs.

customManagers.description: k0s host binary pinned in bootstrap.sh — PR on new releases; apply stays deliberate (Autopilot Plan, ADR 0015). Tags look like v1.35.2+k0s.0.

packageRules.description: k0s updates are NOT applied by Flux — the PR is a trigger, you apply the update deliberately (ADR 0015). Flag it so it never gets auto-merged.
